prompt.title: This PDF is password-protected
prompt.body: <0>{{fileName}}</0> needs a password before it can be edited. It's unlocked here on your device — the password is never sent anywhere.
prompt.wrongPassword: That password didn't work — please try again.

panel.title: Protect this PDF
panel.intro: Choose a password. Anyone opening this file — including you — will need it. It's applied here on your device; the password is never sent anywhere.
